titles.title: Principal Vice President and Managing Director, Bechtel India

about.description: Bechtel's India footprint covers Gurugram, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bechtel operate in India?
faq.a: Bechtel operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bechtel have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Bechtel's India GCC presence is in Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Bechtel run in India?
faq.a: Bechtel runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bechtel's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bechtel's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bechtel's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 6 leaders at Bechtel's India centers, across HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
